headline: FE vs. PNW: Which Utility Stock Is a Better Investment Pick in 2026?
summary: FirstEnergy's earnings outlook, ROE and $36B capex plan give it an edge in a utility head-to-head for 2026.

headline: FirstEnergy Seeks Ohio Rate Hikes Under New Three-Year Grid Plan
summary: FirstEnergy’s Ohio utilities have filed a three-year rate plan centered on grid upgrades, reliability improvements and expanded customer bill assistance programs.
